description: 工程投资审计领域NL2SQL测试集 - 100条

test_cases.question: 目前共有多少个工程项目？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM project_info

test_cases.question: 列出所有在建项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, progress_pct FROM project_info WHERE project_status = '在建'

test_cases.question: 全部项目的批复总投资额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(approved_investment) AS total FROM project_info

test_cases.question: 列出杭州市的所有项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, project_type, approved_investment, project_status, progress_pct FROM project_info WHERE region_name = '杭州市'

test_cases.question: 投资额最大的项目是哪个？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment FROM project_info ORDER BY approved_investment DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 共有多少份工程合同？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM project_contract

test_cases.question: 列出所有已完成的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount FROM project_contract WHERE contract_status = '已完成'

test_cases.question: 2024年付款总金额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(payment_amount) AS total FROM project_payment WHERE YEAR(payment_date) = 2024

test_cases.question: 列出所有工程变更记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT change_code, project_code, change_type, change_difference, change_status FROM project_change

test_cases.question: 已完成的结算有多少笔？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM project_settlement WHERE settlement_status = '已完成'

test_cases.question: 各项目类型的数量和总投资额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total_investment FROM project_info GROUP BY project_type ORDER BY total_investment DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市的项目数量和总投资
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS project_count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total_investment FROM project_info GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_investment DESC

test_cases.question: 各合同类型的数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(contract_amount) AS total_amount FROM project_contract GROUP BY contract_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC

test_cases.question: 各承包方的合同金额汇总
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contractor, COUNT(*) AS contract_count, SUM(contract_amount) AS total_amount FROM project_contract GROUP BY contractor ORDER BY total_amount DESC

test_cases.question: 各付款类型的金额统计
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(payment_amount) AS total FROM project_payment GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 各变更类型的数量和金额变动
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT change_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY change_type

test_cases.question: 哪些项目的实际投资超过了批复投资？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, actual_investment, actual_investment - approved_investment AS overrun FROM project_info WHERE actual_investment > approved_investment

test_cases.question: 查询工期延迟的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, end_date, actual_end_date, DATEDIFF(actual_end_date, end_date) AS delay_days FROM project_info WHERE actual_end_date > end_date

test_cases.question: 各采购方式的合同数量和金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT procurement_method, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(contract_amount) AS total FROM project_contract GROUP BY procurement_method ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 合同金额最大的前5个合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount, project_code FROM project_contract ORDER BY contract_amount DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 查询政府投资类项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, project_status FROM project_info WHERE investment_type = '政府投资'

test_cases.question: 查询中铁四局的所有合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contract_amount, contract_status, project_code FROM project_contract WHERE contractor = '中铁四局'

test_cases.question: 各项目的付款总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, SUM(pp.payment_amount) AS total_paid FROM project_info pi JOIN project_payment pp ON pi.project_code = pp.project_code GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY total_paid DESC

test_cases.question: 各投资类型的项目数量和投资额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT investment_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total FROM project_info GROUP BY investment_type ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 查询所有水利工程项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, project_status, progress_pct FROM project_info WHERE project_type = '水利工程'

test_cases.question: 各项目的变更总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, COUNT(pc.id) AS change_count, SUM(pc.change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_info pi JOIN project_change pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code WHERE pc.change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY total_change DESC

test_cases.question: 工程进度最低的3个在建项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, progress_pct, project_type FROM project_info WHERE project_status = '在建' ORDER BY progress_pct ASC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 结算核减总金额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(reduction_amount) AS total_reduction FROM project_settlement WHERE settlement_status = '已完成'

test_cases.question: 查询预付款支付记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pp.payment_code, pi.project_name, pp.payee, pp.payment_amount, pp.payment_date FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pp.payment_type = '预付款'

test_cases.question: 查找实际开工晚于计划开工的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, start_date, actual_start_date, DATEDIFF(actual_start_date, start_date) AS delay_days FROM project_info WHERE actual_start_date > start_date

test_cases.question: 各项目的投资执行率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, IFNULL(actual_investment, 0) AS actual_investment, ROUND(IFNULL(actual_investment, 0) / approved_investment * 100, 2) AS execution_rate FROM project_info ORDER BY execution_rate

test_cases.question: 查找中标价与控制价偏离超过5%的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, bid_price, bid_control_price, ROUND((bid_control_price - bid_price) / bid_control_price * 100, 2) AS deviation_rate FROM project_contract WHERE (bid_control_price - bid_price) / bid_control_price > 0.05

test_cases.question: 各项目的合同金额与已付款金额对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, SUM(DISTINCT pc.contract_amount) AS total_contract, SUM(pp.payment_amount) AS total_paid FROM project_info pi JOIN project_contract pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code LEFT JOIN project_payment pp ON pi.project_code = pp.project_code GROUP BY pi.project_name

test_cases.question: 查找设计变更导致金额增加超过合同5%的情况
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc2.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.contract_amount, pc2.change_difference, ROUND(pc2.change_difference / pc.contract_amount * 100, 2) AS change_rate FROM project_change pc2 JOIN project_contract pc ON pc2.contract_code = pc.contract_code JOIN project_info pi ON pc2.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc2.change_type = '设计变更' AND pc2.change_difference > 0 AND pc2.change_difference / pc.contract_amount > 0.05

test_cases.question: 各审计组的结算核减金额和核减率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT auditor, COUNT(*) AS settlement_count, SUM(claimed_amount) AS total_claimed, SUM(audited_amount) AS total_audited, SUM(reduction_amount) AS total_reduction, ROUND(SUM(reduction_amount) / SUM(claimed_amount) * 100, 2) AS avg_reduction_rate FROM project_settlement WHERE settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY auditor

test_cases.question: 查找结算核减率超过5%的结算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ps.settlement_code, pi.project_name, ps.claimed_amount, ps.audited_amount, ps.reduction_amount, ps.reduction_rate FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.reduction_rate > 5 AND ps.settlement_status = '已完成'

test_cases.question: 查找预付款比例超过合同金额20%的情况
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pp.payment_code, pi.project_name, pc.contract_amount, pp.payment_amount, ROUND(pp.payment_amount / pc.contract_amount * 100, 2) AS prepay_rate FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_contract pc ON pp.contract_code = pc.contract_code JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pp.payment_type = '预付款' AND pp.payment_amount / pc.contract_amount > 0.2

test_cases.question: 各项目的变更次数和累计变更金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, COUNT(*) AS change_count, SUM(pc.change_difference) AS total_change, pi.approved_investment, ROUND(SUM(pc.change_difference) / pi.approved_investment * 100, 2) AS change_rate FROM project_info pi JOIN project_change pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code WHERE pc.change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment ORDER BY change_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 各项目的合同数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, COUNT(*) AS contract_count, SUM(pc.contract_amount) AS total_contract FROM project_info pi JOIN project_contract pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY total_contract DESC

test_cases.question: 哪些项目的合同总金额超过批复投资额？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, SUM(pc.contract_amount) AS total_contract FROM project_info pi JOIN project_contract pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code GROUP BY pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment HAVING total_contract > pi.approved_investment

test_cases.question: 各月的工程付款金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MONTH(payment_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(payment_amount) AS total FROM project_payment WHERE YEAR(payment_date) = 2024 GROUP BY MONTH(payment_date) ORDER BY month

test_cases.question: 查找单一来源采购或竞争性谈判的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount, procurement_method, project_code FROM project_contract WHERE procurement_method IN ('单一来源', '竞争性谈判')

test_cases.question: 各收款方的付款总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT payee, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(payment_amount) AS total FROM project_payment GROUP BY payee ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 查找变更金额占原合同金额超过10%的变更
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc2.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.contract_amount, pc2.change_difference, ROUND(ABS(pc2.change_difference) / pc.contract_amount * 100, 2) AS change_pct FROM project_change pc2 JOIN project_contract pc ON pc2.contract_code = pc.contract_code JOIN project_info pi ON pc2.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ABS(pc2.change_difference) / pc.contract_amount > 0.1

test_cases.question: 各项目送审金额与审定金额的差异
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, ps.claimed_amount, ps.audited_amount, ps.reduction_amount, ps.reduction_rate FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' ORDER BY ps.reduction_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询审批日期晚于付款日期的付款记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pp.payment_code, pi.project_name, pp.payment_date, pp.approval_date, pp.payment_amount FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pp.approval_date > pp.payment_date

test_cases.question: 各监理单位负责的项目数和总投资
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT supervision_unit, COUNT(*) AS project_count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total_investment FROM project_info GROUP BY supervision_unit ORDER BY total_investment DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市的工程结算核减总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.region_name, SUM(ps.reduction_amount) AS total_reduction FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY pi.region_name ORDER BY total_reduction DESC

test_cases.question: 查询质保金未退还的已完成合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc.contract_name, pc.contractor, pc.warranty_amount FROM project_contract pc WHERE pc.contract_status = '已完成' AND pc.warranty_amount > 0 AND pc.contract_code NOT IN (SELECT pp.contract_code FROM project_payment pp WHERE pp.payment_type = '质保金退还' AND pp.contract_code IS NOT NULL)

test_cases.question: 各资金来源的项目数量和投资额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT funding_source, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total FROM project_info GROUP BY funding_source ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 列出所有完工项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, actual_end_date FROM project_info WHERE project_status = '完工'

test_cases.question: 查询所有施工合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount, project_code FROM project_contract WHERE contract_type = '施工'

test_cases.question: 核减率最高的结算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ps.settlement_code, pi.project_name, ps.reduction_rate, ps.reduction_amount FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' ORDER BY ps.reduction_rate DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 查询杭州地铁5号线二期的所有合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contract_type, contractor, contract_amount FROM project_contract WHERE project_code = 'PJ2023-001'

test_cases.question: 查询所有需要主管部门审批的变更
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.change_type, pc.change_difference FROM project_change pc JOIN project_info pi ON pc.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc.approval_level = '主管部门'

test_cases.question: 查询进度超过80%的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, progress_pct, project_status FROM project_info WHERE progress_pct > 80

test_cases.question: 各项目状态的数量统计
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM project_info GROUP BY project_status

test_cases.question: 查找工程量增加变更且金额超过500万的记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.change_difference, pc.change_reason FROM project_change pc JOIN project_info pi ON pc.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc.change_type = '工程量增加' AND pc.change_difference > 500

test_cases.question: 查询所有PPP项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, project_status FROM project_info WHERE investment_type = 'PPP'

test_cases.question: 各建设单位负责的项目总投资
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT construction_unit, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(approved_investment) AS total FROM project_info GROUP BY construction_unit ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 综合分析：查找存在多次变更且总变更金额超过批复投资5%的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, COUNT(pc.id) AS change_count, SUM(pc.change_difference) AS total_change, ROUND(SUM(pc.change_difference) / pi.approved_investment * 100, 2) AS change_pct FROM project_info pi JOIN project_change pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code WHERE pc.change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY pi.project_code, pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment HAVING change_count >= 2 AND SUM(pc.change_difference) / pi.approved_investment > 0.05

test_cases.question: 各项目的资金使用全貌：批复投资、合同总额、已付款、变更金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, IFNULL(ct.total_contract, 0) AS total_contract, IFNULL(py.total_paid, 0) AS total_paid, IFNULL(ch.total_change, 0) AS total_change FROM project_info pi LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, SUM(contract_amount) AS total_contract FROM project_contract GROUP BY project_code) ct ON pi.project_code = ct.project_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, SUM(payment_amount) AS total_paid FROM project_payment GROUP BY project_code) py ON pi.project_code = py.project_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, SUM(change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY project_code) ch ON pi.project_code = ch.project_code ORDER BY pi.approved_investment DESC

test_cases.question: 查找付款超进度的项目（已付款比例大于工程进度）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, pi.progress_pct, SUM(pp.payment_amount) AS total_paid, ROUND(SUM(pp.payment_amount) / pi.approved_investment * 100, 2) AS payment_pct FROM project_info pi JOIN project_payment pp ON pi.project_code = pp.project_code WHERE pi.project_status = '在建' GROUP BY pi.project_code, pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, pi.progress_pct HAVING payment_pct > pi.progress_pct

test_cases.question: 各项目的中标价与控制价节约金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, SUM(pc.bid_control_price) AS total_control, SUM(pc.bid_price) AS total_bid, SUM(pc.bid_control_price - pc.bid_price) AS total_savings FROM project_contract pc JOIN project_info pi ON pc.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc.bid_control_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY total_savings DESC

test_cases.question: 查找待审状态的工程变更
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.change_type, pc.change_difference, pc.change_reason FROM project_change pc JOIN project_info pi ON pc.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc.change_status = '待审'

test_cases.question: 查询合同工期超过1000天的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_period_days, contract_amount FROM project_contract WHERE contract_period_days > 1000

test_cases.question: 各审批层级的变更数量和金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT approval_level, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY approval_level

test_cases.question: 工程变更的总金额增减是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(change_difference) AS net_change FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准'

test_cases.question: 各项目的质保金总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, SUM(pc.warranty_amount) AS total_warranty FROM project_info pi JOIN project_contract pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY total_warranty DESC

test_cases.question: 付款金额最大的单笔付款
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pp.payment_code, pi.project_name, pp.payee, pp.payment_amount, pp.payment_date FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code ORDER BY pp.payment_amount DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 工程投资审计综合报告：各城市项目数、总投资、总付款、总变更、总核减
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pi.project_code) AS project_count, SUM(DISTINCT pi.approved_investment) AS total_investment, IFNULL(py.total_paid, 0) AS total_paid, IFNULL(ch.total_change, 0) AS total_change, IFNULL(st.total_reduction, 0) AS total_reduction FROM project_info pi LEFT JOIN (SELECT pi2.region_name, SUM(pp.payment_amount) AS total_paid FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_info pi2 ON pp.project_code = pi2.project_code GROUP BY pi2.region_name) py ON pi.region_name = py.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT pi3.region_name, SUM(pc.change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_change pc JOIN project_info pi3 ON pc.project_code = pi3.project_code WHERE pc.change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY pi3.region_name) ch ON pi.region_name = ch.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT pi4.region_name, SUM(ps.reduction_amount) AS total_reduction FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi4 ON ps.project_code = pi4.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY pi4.region_name) st ON pi.region_name = st.region_name GROUP BY pi.region_name ORDER BY total_investment DESC

test_cases.question: 查询中央补助资金的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, funding_source FROM project_info WHERE funding_source = '中央补助'

test_cases.question: 查找合同金额与中标价不一致的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, bid_price, contract_amount, contract_amount - bid_price AS difference FROM project_contract WHERE bid_price IS NOT NULL AND contract_amount != bid_price

test_cases.question: 各城市在建项目的平均进度
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS project_count, ROUND(AVG(progress_pct), 2) AS avg_progress FROM project_info WHERE project_status = '在建' GROUP BY region_name

test_cases.question: 合同总金额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(contract_amount) AS total FROM project_contract

test_cases.question: 各项目预付款占合同金额的比例
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pp.payee, pp.payment_amount AS prepay, pc.contract_amount, ROUND(pp.payment_amount / pc.contract_amount * 100, 2) AS prepay_rate FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_contract pc ON pp.contract_code = pc.contract_code JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pp.payment_type = '预付款' ORDER BY prepay_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询杭州市政集团的所有付款记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT payment_code, project_code, payment_type, payment_amount, payment_date FROM project_payment WHERE payee = '杭州市政集团'

test_cases.question: 综合审计：列出每个项目的风险指标（变更率、付款进度偏离、核减率）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, pi.progress_pct, IFNULL(ch.change_pct, 0) AS change_pct, IFNULL(py.payment_pct, 0) AS payment_pct, IFNULL(st.avg_reduction_rate, 0) AS reduction_rate FROM project_info pi LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, ROUND(SUM(change_difference) / MAX(original_amount) * 100, 2) AS change_pct FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY project_code) ch ON pi.project_code = ch.project_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, ROUND(SUM(payment_amount) / (SELECT approved_investment FROM project_info pi2 WHERE pi2.project_code = pp.project_code) * 100, 2) AS payment_pct FROM project_payment pp GROUP BY project_code) py ON pi.project_code = py.project_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, ROUND(AVG(reduction_rate), 2) AS avg_reduction_rate FROM project_settlement WHERE settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY project_code) st ON pi.project_code = st.project_code ORDER BY pi.project_name

test_cases.question: 查询所有道路桥梁项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, approved_investment, project_status FROM project_info WHERE project_type = '道路桥梁'

test_cases.question: 查找同一项目内多次设计变更的情况
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, COUNT(*) AS design_change_count, SUM(pc.change_difference) AS total_design_change FROM project_info pi JOIN project_change pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code WHERE pc.change_type = '设计变更' GROUP BY pi.project_code, pi.project_name HAVING design_change_count >= 2

test_cases.question: 各审批人审批的付款总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT approver, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(payment_amount) AS total FROM project_payment GROUP BY approver ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 查找邀请招标的合同及其金额占比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount, ROUND(contract_amount / (SELECT SUM(contract_amount) FROM project_contract) * 100, 2) AS pct FROM project_contract WHERE procurement_method = '邀请招标'

test_cases.question: 查看正在审核中的结算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ps.settlement_code, pi.project_name, ps.claimed_amount, ps.auditor FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '审核中'

test_cases.question: 已完工项目的批复投资与实际投资对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, approved_investment, actual_investment, actual_investment - approved_investment AS difference, ROUND((actual_investment - approved_investment) / approved_investment * 100, 2) AS diff_pct FROM project_info WHERE project_status IN ('完工', '验收', '结算') AND actual_investment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY diff_pct DESC

test_cases.question: 进度最快的在建项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT project_name, region_name, progress_pct FROM project_info WHERE project_status = '在建' ORDER BY progress_pct DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各项目类型的平均核减率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_type, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.settlement_code) AS settlement_count, ROUND(AVG(ps.reduction_rate), 2) AS avg_reduction_rate FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY pi.project_type ORDER BY avg_reduction_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询2024年上半年的付款记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pp.payment_code, pi.project_name, pp.payee, pp.payment_amount, pp.payment_date FROM project_payment pp JOIN project_info pi ON pp.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pp.payment_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-06-30' ORDER BY pp.payment_date

test_cases.question: 查找变更后金额超过合同原始金额的变更
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pc2.change_code, pi.project_name, pc.contract_amount AS original_contract, pc2.changed_amount, pc2.changed_amount - pc.contract_amount AS excess FROM project_change pc2 JOIN project_contract pc ON pc2.contract_code = pc.contract_code JOIN project_info pi ON pc2.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE pc2.changed_amount > pc.contract_amount AND pc2.change_status = '已批准'

test_cases.question: 房建工程的总投资额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(approved_investment) AS total FROM project_info WHERE project_type = '房建工程'

test_cases.question: 全部项目的资金到位率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.approved_investment, IFNULL(py.total_paid, 0) AS total_paid, ROUND(IFNULL(py.total_paid, 0) / pi.approved_investment * 100, 2) AS funding_rate FROM project_info pi LEFT JOIN (SELECT project_code, SUM(payment_amount) AS total_paid FROM project_payment GROUP BY project_code) py ON pi.project_code = py.project_code ORDER BY funding_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询设备采购类合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, contract_amount FROM project_contract WHERE contract_type = '设备采购'

test_cases.question: 查询结算金额高于合同金额加变更金额的结算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ps.settlement_code, pi.project_name, ps.contract_amount, ps.change_amount, ps.claimed_amount, ps.claimed_amount - (ps.contract_amount + ps.change_amount) AS excess FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.claimed_amount > ps.contract_amount + ps.change_amount

test_cases.question: 查看EPC项目及其合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pc.contract_name, pc.contractor, pc.contract_amount FROM project_info pi JOIN project_contract pc ON pi.project_code = pc.project_code WHERE pi.investment_type = 'EPC'

test_cases.question: 各项目的平均结算核减率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, COUNT(*) AS settlement_count, ROUND(AVG(ps.reduction_rate), 2) AS avg_reduction_rate FROM project_settlement ps JOIN project_info pi ON ps.project_code = pi.project_code WHERE ps.settlement_status = '已完成' GROUP BY pi.project_name ORDER BY avg_reduction_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 所有结算的送审总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(claimed_amount) AS total FROM project_settlement

test_cases.question: 综合风险排查：付款超进度且有大额变更的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pi.project_name, pi.progress_pct, py.payment_pct, ch.total_change FROM project_info pi JOIN (SELECT project_code, ROUND(SUM(payment_amount) / (SELECT approved_investment FROM project_info pi2 WHERE pi2.project_code = pp.project_code) * 100, 2) AS payment_pct FROM project_payment pp GROUP BY project_code) py ON pi.project_code = py.project_code JOIN (SELECT project_code, SUM(change_difference) AS total_change FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY project_code HAVING SUM(change_difference) > 5000) ch ON pi.project_code = ch.project_code WHERE pi.project_status = '在建' AND py.payment_pct > pi.progress_pct

test_cases.question: 质保金最多的合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT contract_name, contractor, warranty_amount, contract_amount FROM project_contract ORDER BY warranty_amount DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 2024年各季度的付款金额分布
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT QUARTER(payment_date) AS quarter, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(payment_amount) AS total_amount FROM project_payment WHERE YEAR(payment_date) = 2024 GROUP BY QUARTER(payment_date) ORDER BY quarter

test_cases.question: 工程投资审计总报告：项目总数、总投资、总合同额、总付款、总核减
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_info) AS total_projects, (SELECT SUM(approved_investment) FROM project_info) AS total_investment, (SELECT SUM(contract_amount) FROM project_contract) AS total_contracts, (SELECT SUM(payment_amount) FROM project_payment) AS total_payments, (SELECT SUM(reduction_amount) FROM project_settlement WHERE settlement_status = '已完成') AS total_reductions

test_cases.question: 跨表关联审计：找出所有存在问题的项目（超投资、超工期、高核减率、大额变更）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT pi.project_name, pi.region_name, CASE WHEN pi.actual_investment > pi.approved_investment THEN '超投资' ELSE '' END AS over_investment, CASE WHEN pi.actual_end_date > pi.end_date THEN '超工期' ELSE '' END AS over_schedule FROM project_info pi WHERE pi.actual_investment > pi.approved_investment OR pi.actual_end_date > pi.end_date OR pi.project_code IN (SELECT project_code FROM project_settlement WHERE reduction_rate > 7 AND settlement_status = '已完成') OR pi.project_code IN (SELECT project_code FROM project_change WHERE change_status = '已批准' GROUP BY project_code HAVING SUM(change_difference) > 5000)
